title: Uniface
text: Uniface An environment for developing, integrating, deploying, and running complex, component-based applications. Application development with Uniface is business model-driven and the resulting applications are infrastructure-independent and can run in almost any desired architecture. Uniface: the generic product name; use whenever you mean generic Uniface functionality, which is often the case in our docs. Avoid referring to the specific version of Uniface, except in what's new and migration documentation, or in cases such as ProcScript statements where the functionality differs from one version to another.
